subcodes.title: Words spoken at 1815 California Street in San Francisco, 1912-10-10
subcodes.first_line: You are all welcome, exceedingly welcome. I have journeyed a great distance to visit you, having longed to see you, for Bahá’u’lláh has created a marvelous love in the hearts
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity; oneness of humanity, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
